title: Check 5 — Category-Specific Quantity & UOM Validation
description: Reference data for Check 5 category-specific rules (doc §5.5). Informs LLM and fallback when to apply EA vs CS warning, time-based UOM, etc.

MRO / Facilities.rule: If quote UOM is case (CS) but PR UOM is each (EA), WARNING: possible error (ordering 100 EA when quote was 100 CS). Calculate pr_qty vs quote_qty * units_per_case if available.

MRO.rule: Same as MRO/Facilities. CS vs EA mismatch triggers WARNING.

Office Supplies.rule: If quote UOM is case (CS) but PR UOM is each (EA), WARNING. Common error: 100 EA when quote was 100 CS.

Services.rule: UOM should be time-based (HR, HRS, HOURS, DAY, WK, MO). If UOM is not time-based, WARNING: T&M services should use time units. Check total hours reasonable for duration.

Professional Services.rule: Same as Services. Time-based UOM for T&M.

Chemicals.rule: Verify quantity against hazmat storage limits and permits. Large quantities may require safety review. Check container size compatibility.
Chemicals.notes: No auto-fail; flag for review if very large qty

Print / Marketing.rule: Quantity must be valid print run increment (often 500 or 1000). Order 1,750 = invalid. Check warehouse capacity for storage.
Print / Marketing.notes: WARNING if qty not multiple of 500/1000

category_lookup_notes: Match PR category_l1 or category_l2 against keys (case-insensitive). If no match, apply only core rules 5.1–5.3, 5.7.
